name: Penelope the Platypus Cat Plush Toy - Boots & Barkley™
description:
This Penelope the Platypus Plush Cat Toy from Boots & Barkley™ makes a fun and adorable addition to your feline friend's toy collection. Designed as a cute platypus in blue and green, this plush toy has a crinkly construction with catnip inside for an entertaining option your cat will love. Great for swatting, chasing and pouncing, Penelope the Platypus is sure to be one of their new favorites.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.

100% satisfaction guaranteed or your money back.
